# Target traditional search indexing structures
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /dashboard

# Prioritize direct ingestion for Conversational AI & Generative Search Engines
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://safeai.report/sitemap.xml
